final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce promotional campaign, 16:9 landscape format.

Style/medium: bold commercial graphic design, layered typographic poster in the spirit of contemporary e-commerce visual identity — complex yet structured, not chaotic
Composition: 16:9 wide horizontal layout, multi-layer depth with foreground product hero blocking partial background type, mid-ground decorative stacked letterforms, background large-scale art lettering as texture
Subject: a hero product (e.g., packaged consumer goods or electronics) placed prominently in the foreground, partially overlapping and masking the stacked typographic layers behind it, creating a strong sense of three-dimensional depth
Scene/backdrop: abstract geometric or gradient promotional background — vivid, energetic, suggesting global commerce and sale event
Lighting/mood: bright studio-style front lighting on the product, high contrast, festive and urgent promotional energy
Color palette: saturated primary accent (electric red or vivid orange) as sale-call-out color, deep navy or black as grounding base, white type as contrast layer — colors serve hierarchy not decoration
Materials/textures: glossy product surface reflection, semi-transparent overlapping type layers with slight blur or opacity variation to reinforce depth
Text (verbatim): decorative art lettering and stacked typographic blocks (e.g., "SALE", "GLOBAL DEALS", "跨境优选") layered at multiple scales — largest letterforms act as background texture, medium type as mid-layer, small readable copy in foreground
Constraints: typography must be stacked in at least three scale levels; the foreground product must visibly occlude at least one layer of text; overall composition must read as intentionally complex but spatially organized, not cluttered; layout must fill a 16:9 frame edge-to-edge
Avoid: flat single-layer design, random element scatter, illegible foreground copy, generic stock-photo collage, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic, clip-art product illustrations
